title: MCLangSplit Fabric
description: Injects a second language into text
body:
This is a Fabric port of Ant's [MCLangSplit](https://github.com/AntMCDev/MCLangSplit), which injects a second language into all text strings in the game.

Depends on [Cloth Config API](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cloth-config)

To configure the second language, edit mclangsplit.toml in the config directory, for example:
```
languageSetting = "ja_jp" # Set this to the second language
ignoreKeys = ["itemGroup.search"] # A list of language keys to skip adding the second language to
```

![A screenshot of the Minecraft menu in both English and Japanese](https://files.vpzom.click/2021-08-05_00.38.38.png)
